rationale: Diff for this bead contains only result.json (execution metadata) and the bead-range commits add only test files (artifacts_test.go) + evidence — no resolver, schema, or frontend changes required by the AC. mediaType wildcard, ArtifactSort enum, staleness arg, server-side search wiring, and cursor-reset are not implemented in this bead's diff (appear to live under separate bead ddx-0ac5f35d, commit 13896420).

findings.summary: AC requires resolver change to translate 'image/*' to HasPrefix; no change to resolver_artifacts.go in bead diff
AC requires adding ArtifactSort enum and staleness arg to schema; schema.graphql is unchanged in this bead
AC requires frontend to pass URL 'q' as GraphQL search arg and reset 'after' cursor; no frontend files changed in bead range
Bead range (2675f38b..16aaf8b2) contains a single commit that only adds artifacts_test.go and ac_evidence.md — implementation appears already merged via ddx-0ac5f35d (commit 13896420)
Provided <changed-files> lists only .ddx/executions/.../result.json, so the diff is insufficient to verify any AC item
